_readme: Jira MCP server configuration. Copy relevant sections into your agent's MCP settings. Store credentials in environment variables, never in this file.
_tools_provided: jira_get_issue — fetch a single issue by key (e.g. PROJ-123)
jira_search_issues — JQL search (e.g. project=PROJ AND sprint in openSprints())
jira_create_issue — create a new story, bug, task, or epic
jira_update_issue — update fields: summary, description, assignee, status, labels
jira_transition_issue — move issue through workflow (e.g. In Progress → Done)
jira_add_comment — add a comment to an issue
jira_get_sprints — list sprints for a board
_skill_pairings: skills/cross-cutting/jira-intelligence — AI-native Jira commands powered by this MCP
skills/manager/story-slicing — uses jira_create_issue to create child stories
skills/manager/backlog-refinement — uses jira_search_issues to pull sprint backlog
skills/manager/sprint-retrospective — uses jira_create_issue for action items
skills/manager/engineering-metrics — uses jira_search_issues with JQL for metrics
